lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Thanks for your help! You should have a break now. Come back in [number] minutes if you want to hand out more eggs.

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: But I'm afraid I've left things a bit late this year. I'm going to need some help to get all these eggs delivered! Would you help me, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Oh dear, you don't have any free inventory space. Talk to me again when you have.

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Splendid, splendid! Here's a basket of eggs. Hand out as many as you can before they disappear and then come back to me. You've only got two minutes!

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Splendid, splendid! Here's a basket of eggs. Hand out as many as you can before they disappear and then come back to me for your reward. You've only got two minutes!

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Oh dear oh dear! I've got to hurry!

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Quickly, [player name]! Hand out those eggs before they vanish!

sections.title: After the timer has run out
If no eggs were handed out

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Oh dear, [player name]. You didn't hand out any eggs at all! Do you want to try again?

sections.title: If at least one egg was handed out

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Thank you, [player name]! You handed out [number] eggs!

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: Thank you, [player name]! You handed out [number] eggs! Here is your Easter reward!

lines.speaker: Easter Bunny
lines.text: If you lose it, you can get another one from Diango in Draynor.
